__comment: Prod environment: microk8s on pinfo1, fronted by Cloudflare Tunnel.
__comment_baseUrl: Set the PROD_BASE_URL environment variable at runtime to override baseUrl (e.g. https://unigevents.example.com).
__comment_enc: Encrypted values were generated with Helper.encryptData(plaintext, salt). Run test/util/encrypt-credentials.feature once to produce your own values.
__comment_sensitive: Set AUTH0_CLIENT_ID, TEST_ORGANIZER_PASSWORD_ENC, TEST_STUDENT_PASSWORD_ENC and TEST_ADMIN_PASSWORD_ENC as environment variables before running tests.
__comment_serviceUrls: In prod all traffic goes through Kong via the public ingress. Direct service URLs are not publicly exposed.
